raw_text: We should invest   Battery swap technology for  buses for Big cities,  There will  5-8 major bus station should have Battery swap station which can swap fully charged battery in 15 min.  Maximum distance travelled by City bus one way is around 50 km. So Battery capacity max required is 75 km. No need to have Big battery capacity Once Bus reaches end point It should swap new fully charged battery for return trip.  Smaller batteries will reduce cost and increase range.  Since battery are swappable and as well as smaller, their can be charged slowly overnight with more reliable charger.    Buses need not to have their own charger control which wil reduce weight and cost.  Now Government can "Buy batterie's Ampere" hours and Own the Basic bus without the battery.
